flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bergen Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bergen Community College rose 53% between 2006 and 2009 (9.0% → 13.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bergen Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (9.6k → 10.6k).
